sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3), description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime64('2023-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3), 'Start of Year'), (2, toDateTime64('2023-02-28 23:59:59.999', 3), 'End of February'), (3, toDateTime64('2023-03-31 12:30:45.123', 3), 'End of March'), (4, toDateTime64('2023-04-21 10:20:30.456', 3), 'Middle of April');
SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_time) AS day, toMillisecond(event_time) AS millisecond FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_time, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_time) as year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_time) as month, toMillisecond(event_time) AS ms FROM test_dates WHERE toMillisecond(event_time) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_time) as hour, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY hour HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, event_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates d WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d.event_time) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.event_time)) AS count_in_year FROM test_dates t;
SELECT EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM event_time), SUM(toMillisecond(event_time)) FROM test_dates GROUP BY EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM event_time) HAVING SUM(toMillisecond(event_time)) > 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE toMillisecond(event_time) > 500;
SELECT toMillisecond(event_time), EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_time) FROM temp_dates WHERE EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_time) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_time), MIN(toMillisecond(event_time)), MAX(toMillisecond(event_time)) FROM test_dates GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_time) HAVING MAX(toMillisecond(event_time)) >= 900;
